case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS GLOVER, DAVID

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,268.20 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GLOVER, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLOVER, DAVID $1,203.20 PRINCIPAL, $40.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,244.07, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
*PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $25.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON 6-15-04 & ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY -

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-25-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-15-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLED BETWEEN THE PARTIES. 3 MONTH PROGRESS REPORT ON 8/24/04 @ 1:30 PM. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE EVERY 6 MONTHS THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-14-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-21-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NO APPEARANCES. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE EVERY 6 MONTHS UNTIL AMOUNT PAID IN FULL, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GLOVER, DAVID
- PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-15-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-14-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR STATUS REPORT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO GLOVER, DAVID, RETURNED TO COURT UNABLE TO FORWARD.
